name: SpringBoot-Scan

documentation.readme: ✈️ 一、工具概述 日常渗透过程中，经常会碰到Spring Boot搭建的微服务，于是就想做一个针对Spring Boot的开源渗透框架，主要用作扫描Spring Boot的敏感信息泄露端点，并可以直接测试Spring的相关高危漏洞。于是，就写了这么一个工具：SpringBoot-Scan 【简称：“SB-Scan”（错乱】
usage_sections: [x] 感谢 @iChet666 师傅的反馈，针对CVE-2021-21344 (EurekaXstream 反序列化漏洞) 在利用过程中可能导致破坏业务的情况，进行流程优化和Exp利用二次确认
[x] 感谢 @ez-lbz 师傅提交的PR，添加支持CVE-2025-41243 (Spring Cloud Gateway环境属性修改漏洞)
[x] 感谢 @ez-lbz 师傅提交的PR，添加支持CVE-2024-37084 (Spring Cloud Data Flow远程命令执行漏洞)
[x] 添加支持2023 JeeSpringCloud 任意文件上传漏洞
[x] 添加支持CVE-2022-22947 (Spring Cloud Gateway SpELRCE漏洞)

arguments.name: -d
arguments.description: --dump 扫描并下载SpringBoot敏感文件（可提取敏感信息）

arguments.name: -df
arguments.description: --dumpfile 读取目标TXT进行批量敏感文件扫描（可提取敏感信息）

arguments.name: --dump
arguments.description: 扫描并下载SpringBoot敏感文件（可提取敏感信息）

arguments.name: --dumpfile
arguments.description: 读取目标TXT进行批量敏感文件扫描（可提取敏感信息）

arguments.name: -f
arguments.description: --fofa 通过对接Fofa的API批量下载Spring的资产测绘数据

arguments.name: --newheader
arguments.description: 从TXT文件中导入自定义HTTP头部

arguments.name: -p
arguments.description: --proxy 使用HTTP进行代理（默认连通性测试www.baidu.com）

arguments.name: -t
arguments.description: --newheader 从TXT文件中导入自定义HTTP头部

arguments.name: -u
arguments.description: --url 对单一URL进行信息泄露扫描

arguments.name: -uf
arguments.description: --urlfile 读取目标TXT进行批量信息泄露扫描

arguments.name: --url
arguments.description: 对单一URL进行信息泄露扫描

arguments.name: --urlfile
arguments.description: 读取目标TXT进行信息泄露扫描

arguments.name: -vf
arguments.description: --vulfile 读取目标TXT进行批量漏洞扫描

arguments.name: --vulfile
arguments.description: 读取目标TXT进行批量漏洞扫描

arguments.name: -y
arguments.description: --hunter 通过对接Hunter的API批量下载Spring的资产测绘数据

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --version
arguments.description: Print the tool version and exit.

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

arguments.name: --capture
arguments.description: Capture mode: write packets to a pcap file.

function_signatures.name: configure
function_signatures.description: Configure the tool with runtime options (interface, target, etc.) before execution.

function_signatures.name: scan
function_signatures.description: Perform a read-only scan / probe of the target.

function_signatures.name: exploit
function_signatures.description: Run the offensive step against the target. Returns ok, data, error envelope.

function_signatures.name: report
function_signatures.description: Render the result into a human-readable or machine-readable report.

function_signatures.name: validate
function_signatures.description: Pre-flight check: confirm the target is reachable and the tool can run.

function_signatures.name: cleanup
function_signatures.description: Remove any artifacts left behind by the tool (pcaps, sessions, files).

examples: 对单一URL进行信息泄露扫描:         python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -u $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL
读取目标TXT进行批量信息泄露扫描:   python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -uf url.txt
对单一URL进行漏洞扫描:             python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -v $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL
读取目标TXT进行批量漏洞扫描：      python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -vf url.txt
扫描并下载SpringBoot敏感文件:      python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -d $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL
读取目标TXT进行批量敏感文件扫描:   python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -df url.txt
使用HTTP代理并自动进行连通性测试:    python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -p <代理IP:端口>
从TXT文件中导入自定义HTTP头部:       python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -t header.txt
通过ZoomEye密钥进行API下载数据:      python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -z <ZoomEye的API-KEY>
file_listing: 读取目标TXT进行批量敏感文件扫描.png

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with niuniuniuniuniu/Py-nmap-hydra (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with blueberry2345/nmap-gpt (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with amber0003/ssh-hacking-using-nmap (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web', 'cloud'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web', 'cloud'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web', 'cloud'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web, cloud] in the Web Application Security category. Fits when the engagement needs: ![SpringBoot-Scan](https://socialify.git.ci/AabyssZG/SpringBoot-Scan/image?description=1&descriptionEditable=Open%20source%20penetration%20framework%20for%20SpringBoot%20and%20high-risk%20vulnerability%20exploitation%20t.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: ✈️ 一、工具概述 日常渗透过程中，经常会碰到Spring Boot搭建的微服务，于是就想做一个针对Spring Boot的开源渗透框架，主要用作扫描Spring Boot的敏感信息泄露端点，并可以直接测试Spring的相关高危漏洞。于是，就写了这么一个工具：SpringBoot-Scan 【简称：“SB-Scan”（错乱】.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: pip install -r requirements.txt; pip install -r requirements.txt -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple/. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `icon_hash="116323821"||body="Whitelabel Error Page"`. Further invocations from upstream: `对单一URL进行信息泄露扫描:         python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -u $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL`; `读取目标TXT进行批量信息泄露扫描:   python3 SpringBoot-Scan.py -uf url.txt`.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: Use after httpx / wappalyzer / whatweb has identified the target web stack (CMS, framework, server).
Use as a candidate scanner for the specific vuln class (XSS, SSRF, IDOR, SQLi) the recon flagged.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Pair with the LLM system-prompt stanza to ensure the chain planner knows how to call this tool.
